name: Christopher Cross
abstract: Christopher Cross (born Christopher Charles Geppert; May 3, 1951) is an American singer, songwriter, and guitarist. He won five Grammy Awards for his eponymous debut album released in 1979.

concerts.label: Tribute to Dudley Moore
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: The Music of Paul McCartney

about_quotes.speaker: Ernie Watts
about_quotes.evidence: There’s an alto one that’s real good on “Arthur” that I did with Christopher Cross.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ernie Watts interviewed by Monk Rowe, Toronto, Canada, January 11, 2003

about_quotes.speaker: Chazz Frichtel
about_quotes.evidence: I had played one gig with Christopher, it wasn’t even his gig, it was a showcase at a club in Santa Monica called At My Place. And Christopher ended up being the guitar player in the band for my friend...
about_quotes.doc_title: Chazz Frichtel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 13, 2016
